name: volf

appearance.hair: Salt-and-pepper dark brown hair, cut short
appearance.face: Deep-set eyes, strong jaw, short stubble beard, gruff but not unkind expression, wrinkles around eyes
appearance.outfit: Dark leather apron over a linen shirt, sleeves rolled up
appearance.notable: Favors left knee slightly (bad knees). Large hands — used to hard work.

personality.behavior_pattern: Experienced innkeeper. Businesslike but fair. Never overcharges, never forgets a friend.
personality.speech_style: Low voice, short sentences. Not rude but not warm either. Warms up when trust is earned.
personality.motivation: Run the inn well. Honor old friendships (Ernes).

relationships.ernes: Old friend. Receives mountain herbs for his knees. Trusts Ernes completely.

description: Owner of Red Chimney Inn. Old friend of Ernes. Bad knees.
